name: windmill-safety
description: Block destructive Windmill CLI operations — sync push without pull, script overrides, and auto-yes flags
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Require pull before push
hooks.description: Blocks wmill sync push unless a wmill sync pull was run first in this session

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill sync push'; then if [ ! -f /tmp/.wmill-pulled ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: run wmill sync pull first to avoid overwriting remote changes."}'; fi; fi; }

hooks.name: Track sync pull
hooks.description: Sets a marker file when wmill sync pull is run so push can proceed

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill sync pull'; then touch /tmp/.wmill-pulled; fi; }

hooks.name: Block --yes flag on sync
hooks.description: Prevents wmill sync push --yes which bypasses confirmation prompts

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill sync push.*--yes'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wmill sync push --yes bypasses confirmation. Remove --yes to review changes before pushing."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block plain secrets in sync
hooks.description: Prevents --plain-secrets flag which exposes secrets as unencrypted text

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill .* --plain-secrets'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: --plain-secrets exposes secrets as unencrypted text. Remove the flag."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block script push without review
hooks.description: Blocks wmill script push which overrides remote script versions — get explicit approval

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill script push '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wmill script push overrides remote versions. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block script and flow execution
hooks.description: Blocks wmill script run and wmill flow run which execute code on the remote Windmill instance

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill (script|flow) run '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wmill script/flow run executes code on the remote instance. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block reading variables and resources
hooks.description: Blocks wmill variable get and wmill resource get which can expose secrets and credentials

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^wmill (variable|resource) get '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: wmill variable/resource get can expose secrets and credentials. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }
